resolution_summary: Fixed in EXP-468-HOL-MISSING-c2-reactive-prose-pattern.json. Changed 'the dome author built the monitor.py / status_history.json / SHA-256 pipeline himself and has the technical capacity to implement the same pattern in an afternoon' to 'the dome author built the monitor.py / status_history.json / SHA-256 pipeline himself; adapting that pipeline to add an independently-anchored predictions document requires no new infrastructure.' Removes subjective capacity claim about the dome author; replaces with an objective infrastructure assessment that the existing pipeline already satisfies the prerequisites.
action_for_decider: integrate EXP-468 (now revised); close ISS-2407 as resolved
